title: Smash Bros CD
description: A mod that has Music Discs based on the Smash Bros Minecraft soundtrack.
body:
A Minecraft Mod that features the Tracks from the Minecraft soundtrack, from Super Smash Bros Ultimate.

All of the 7 Songs are Here!

![halland/dalarna disc](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3d65da42fa6fe496976b036006f289d48386ea08.png)![earth disc](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e15ce0c107d998f231ea74c4f9fb9cb6f7a06fd.png)![clockwork disc](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/46fbc10a54fec1216d6bc7c381c9a202c98732c1.png)![toys disc](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/995fffaaea58894870ed42ed292aa0dc96a979f0.png)![dance disc](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/09bbbbf7430bc914ddeb64ff1ffbba4e23ba96af.png)![glide disc](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/99203b1fe0a9b7008ec58914bb142216fa12e81a.png)![arch illager disc](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/42e7aa06eb4240a6e3bbe8fc480dedaea2b716fb.png)

1. Halland/Dalarna
2. Earth
3. Clockwork Crafter
4. Toys on a Tear
5. Dance of the Blocks
6. Glide
7. The Arch-Illager


This is a Mod made out of love of Both Minecraft and Super Smash Bros, no copyright infringement was inteded. All Rights of the music goes to the artists who made the songs, as well as Nintendo, Bandai Namco, and Sora Ltd.


Thanks for Checking out the Mod!!
